description: Composition Purple kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a V-neck and a buttoned chest placket, pin tucks across the chest with embroidery and sequin detailing, and has printed full sleeves Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron Designed to celebrate womanhood in all its facets, this kurta from biba is inspired by traditional Indian print and dye arts that make it a special wardrobe favourite. The soft cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the printed sleeves add zing to the garment. Team it with leggings or pyjamas, chunky accessories and heeled sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
